name: Frances Langford
abstract: Frances Langford (née Julia Frances Langford; April 4, 1913 – July 11, 2005) was an American singer and actress who was popular during the Golden Age of Radio and made film and television appearances for over two decades. She was known as the "GI Nightingale", an American armed-forces sweetheart, who entertained troops by frequently tour…

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Davern
about_quotes.evidence: I remember my mother singing this... Frances Langford was the girl singer with the band
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Davern interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 16, 2001 [interview 2 of 2]
